name_en: 🆕【Top Quality】M12635 Embossed 👏👏A compact "Victor Wallet" updated with a "Quai d'Orsay" vibe, featuring a single-embossed shadow leather. Besides a zippered pocket, it includes practical interiors with bill and receipt pockets and five card slots. The flap closed by a "Louis Vuitton"-signed shutter button is also charming. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9 x 2.5.
